positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic forest pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and celestial animal silhouettes (e.g., crescent moon foxes, shooting star deer). The composition must be central and repeating, designed as a seamless textile print. Use a deep indigo, cyan, and soft gold color palette. The style should be a mix of neo-art deco and geometric minimalism, utilizing clean, thick lines and strong, flat color blocking. Highly detailed line art mixed with solid, contrasting shapes. Perfect for apparel printing, high contrast, elegant glow effect, vaporwave aesthetic, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, blurry edges, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photorealistic
